Slot: FINGER
SV DISEASE: +10 SV POISON: +10
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Hurrieta's Tunic
Paladin Hunting

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

West Karana
NPC Name
Brother Trintle

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

North Qeynos
Quest Name
Rat Shaped Rings

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
North Qeynos
South Qeynos
The Qeynos Aqueduct System
Sometimes dropped by members of the Blood Sabres


Uploaded September 28th, 2024 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
Why can't I wear this ring?
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2003 at 3:52 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
I am a shadowknight in Qeynos and technically a Bloodsaber, so why can't I wear the Bloodsabers ring? The thing I don't understand is that if the rat shaped ring is a reward for doing a Bloodsaber quest, why can't sks, necro, etc wear the ring? This ring should be ALL/ALL but with the restriction that the wearer be a follower of Bertoxxolous.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
RE: Why can't I wear this ring?
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2003 at 7:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764570069
229 posts
The ring is obtained by killing a traitor to the Priests of Life who is working for the bloodsabres. It is used in a quest in the Qeynos cleric/palidan guild. So for you to obtain it you would have to go against your own people.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 27 2002 at 11:15 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this ring is freaky but i say that post before mine is right it is worth motre thsn the faction and four silver sure it not all like the one with almost same stats that is 3.5k but clr pal and warr can use and pal and warr have fairly bad resist so whoever gets one hope u find a person to sell ing to i bought one of the merchant nerar kaladim banker for 1 pp so i am giving it to one of my freinds that has no ring, and if neither needs i give to TOTAL NEWB WHO USE CLOTH AMOR and make him a partiuly uber lvl 1 newb i like doing that to peeps it a way of thanking the lvl 50-60 that were grasios to me on rallos zek and solosek ro.
Dont turn in
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2001 at 7:08 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591772914912
50 posts
I got this ring as a drop off Brother Trintle (easy kill). i turned in the busted prayer beads to Suuspa. She mentioned something about telling her about any other items he had, so I gave her the ring (not monk wearable, and i hoped i would get something useful). She gave me 4 silver and some faction, im sure i could have sold the ring for at least a couple plat. Im stalking Trintle now, looking for another ring.
▲ Page top
Shadow Knights
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2001 at 1:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361534386
17 posts
Shadow Knights can wear this ring, my thirty-five shadow knight still has it equipped; so Allakhazam, please allow shadowknights to be able to equip this ring on our character stats screen!

Well if your off to kill that evil rat ******* dragon and your cheap like me this is an good item, and easy enough to get. I was pissed the garac guy kept giving me round shields and raw hide bp and bunch of other crap.
